lessons.observation: Cold start BTC allocation floor (90%) effectively limits drawdown risk during strategy validation phase. vs_hodl -0.4575% reflects only bootstrap fees, no alpha trades yet.

lessons.observation: FGI=30 is a boundary condition for DCA: the rule requires F&G strictly < 30. At exactly 30, DCA does NOT trigger. System code and agents must use strict < operator, not <=.
lessons.lesson: DCA strict threshold: F&G < 30, not <= 30. Value of exactly 30 does not qualify. Boundary conditions must use strict comparison.

notes: Cold start: No strategies retired. One strategy created from approved hypothesis hch_20260524_001. Backtest indicated curve fit warning due to limited historical sample matching daily RSI < 30 + FGI = 25 + price > EMA200 by 5%+.
